
::: {.paper-table}
**Table 27. B.9 Management and firm-level — information and structure**

| Intervention | Outcome | Effect | Source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Management consulting (SMEs, India) | Productivity, profit | +17% productivity; +$325K/yr profit | Bloom et al. [@bloom2013] |
| Work-from-home (where feasible, pre-COVID) | Performance / satisfaction | Large positive in one large RCT; variable elsewhere | Bloom, Liang, Roberts, Ying 2015 |
| Targeted wage subsidies (hard-to-employ) | Employment | Substantial effects on specific populations | Card, Kluve & Weber [@card2018] |
| Vocational training (long-term follow-up) | Earnings | Small short-term; meaningful long-run | Card et al.; “large” relative to typical short-run nulls |
:::
